description: You are a biomedical engineer preparing a skull model for 3D printing from the loaded CT Cranium DICOM series in InVesalius 3. Following the printer specifications in /home/ga/Documents/3d_print_specs.txt, create a bone segmentation mask and generate a 3D bone surface mesh. Apply at least 15 smoothing iterations to reduce noise and decimate the mesh to fewer than 500,000 triangles. Export the optimized mesh as a PLY to /home/ga/Documents/skull_optimized.ply and a Binary STL to /home/ga/Documents/skull_optimized.stl. Save the InVesalius project to /home/ga/Documents/mesh_optimization.inv3. Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123
